ew_context: Impulsive breakout from consolidation — likely wave 3 or C wave acceleration above key cloud resistance
pattern_desc: Strong breakout above Ichimoku cloud top at 78.48 with Kijun support at 74.89. Momentum aligned with price action confirming bullish structure.
key_levels: Support: 74.89 (Kijun line), 78.48 (cloud top now support). Resistance: 89.59 (swing high)
invalidation: Close below 78.48 cloud top on D1 timeframe would negate the bullish breakout signal
market_context: Precious metals benefiting from softer dollar as US-Iran peace deal hopes rise. RSI at 78.2% shows strong momentum despite overbought readings
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Silver has achieved a decisive Ichimoku breakout above the cloud top at 78.48, with Kijun support established at 74.89. The 2.97 ATR reflects elevated volatility typical of breakout phases, while momentum alignment (CFD Reynolds=5.98) confirms institutional buying pressure. Despite RSI at elevated 78.2%, the breakout pattern suggests further upside potential toward 89.59 resistance.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 89.59 (prior swing high representing next major target)
- **Support**: 78.48 (cloud top now acting as support), 74.89 (Kijun line)

## Invalidation Level

A daily close below 78.48 would breach the cloud top support and negate the bullish Ichimoku breakout signal, suggesting false breakout conditions.

## Macro & Flow Context

Precious metals rally on softer dollar amid rising US-Iran peace deal optimism. The momentum-aligned flow conditions support continued institutional accumulation despite stretched RSI readings.
